## Learned Rules
<!-- Auto-generated by Imprint. Edit or delete any rule. -->
- When adding examples to judge/evaluator prompts, use generic illustrative examples — never the exact fixtures used in the benchmark suite. Leaking test cases into the prompt contaminates evaluation results.
- Before writing or reviewing any code or prose, check if the repo has relevant style guides (language or writing) and follow them. Catch violations during implementation, not in review.
